channel.name: OpenEyes PAS

com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.name: PASAPI XSLT Step
com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.template:
1 LOCAL-1-0 <xsl:value-of select="concat(translate(substring(//PID.5.5,1,1), $vLower, $vUpper),translate(substring(//PID.5.5,2), $vUpper, $vLower))"/> M F
GB
10 G9999981

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.name: HospitalNumber
VisitID
VisitDate
VisitTime
ClinicCode
AppointmentType
VisitStatusXML
Check for warnings
PatientId

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptrule.name: Appointment Filter

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.name: Resource not found

channel.preprocessingScript: // Modify the message variable below to pre process data return message;
